_description: Document templates that agents generate for members. Each template has placeholder variables ({{variable}}) that get filled from the dataset.

templates.name: Explanation of Benefits
templates.description: Standard EOB sent to members after a claim is processed.

templates.name: Claim Denial Letter
templates.description: Letter sent when a medical claim is denied.
templates.template_text:
{{current_date}}

{{member_name}}
{{member_address}}

Re: Claim Denial Notice
Claim Number: {{claim_id}}
Member ID: {{member_id}}

Dear {{member_name}},

We have reviewed the claim submitted for services provided on {{service_date}} by {{provider_name}} for {{procedure_description}}.

After careful review, this claim has been DENIED for the following reason:

{{denial_reason}}

Billed Amount: ${{billed_amount}}
Plan Payment: $0.00

YOUR RIGHT TO APPEAL
You have the right to appeal this decision. To file an appeal:
1. Submit a written appeal within 180 days of this notice
2. Include any additional medical records or documentation supporting medical necessity
3. Your provider may also appeal on your behalf

Mail appeals to:
Appeals Department
PO Box 12345
Processing Center, ST 00000

Or call: 1-800-555-PLAN (7526)

If your internal appeal is denied, you may request an independent external review.

Sincerely,
Claims Review Department

templates.name: Authorization Approval Letter
templates.description: Letter confirming approval of a prior authorization request.

templates.name: Authorization Denial Letter
templates.description: Letter when a prior authorization request is denied.

templates.name: Member ID Card

templates.name: Welcome Letter
templates.description: Welcome letter sent to new members upon enrollment.

templates.name: Appeal Acknowledgment Letter
templates.description: Acknowledgment letter sent when an appeal is received.
